 McDonaldвҖҷs Belgium: a local story

Denys, bet you didnвҖҷt know these 5 facts about McDonaldвҖҷs Belgium... 


Each day, *over 9,000 crew members* are ready to serve you. Always with a smile.В рҹҳү



Oh, and did you know that more than *9 out of 10 ingredients are sourced from Europe* ?В рҹҮӘрҹҮә



We bring families together, in our restaurants and at the *Ronald McDonald House*. Over 600 families have already been able to stay there, close to the hospital, supporting their child when it matters most.В рҹ«¶



We also fuel the hunger for entrepreneurship, as *every McDonaldвҖҷs* in Belgium is owned and run by a *local franchisee*.рҹ“Қ



And last but not least: all our restaurants run on *100% green energy* !вҡЎ


 As you can see, McDonaldвҖҷs Belgium has a fascinating, and indeed local, story.
